sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id UInt32, event_date DateTime, value Int32, description String);
SELECT id, positiveModulo(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM event_date) + 5, 12) AS month_adjusted FROM test_dates WHERE value > 0;
SELECT id, EXTRACT(DAY FROM toDate('2023-01-01')) AS event_day, positiveModulo(value, 3) AS mod_value FROM test_dates;

WITH (SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM test_dates WHERE value < 0) AS negative_count SELECT id, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM event_date) AS event_year, positiveModulo(negative_count.cnt, 2) AS adjusted_count FROM test_dates JOIN (SELECT event_date, COUNT(*) FROM test_dates GROUP BY event_date) AS grouped_dates ON grouped_dates.event_date = test_dates.event_date;
CREATE TABLE temp_dates AS SELECT * FROM test_dates WHERE value IS NOT NULL; SELECT id, positiveModulo(EXTRACT(HOUR FROM event_date), 24) AS hour_mod FROM temp_dates WHERE event_date < now();

SELECT id, positiveModulo(EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM event_date), NULLIF(EXTRACT(SECOND FROM event_date), 0)) AS min_mod_sec FROM test_dates WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_dates WHERE description = 'Old Year') ORDER BY min_mod_sec;
SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM NULL) AS null_year, positiveModulo(EXTRACT(DAY FROM event_date), 7) AS day_mod FROM test_dates;

CREATE TABLE boundary_test (test_value Float64); INSERT INTO boundary_test VALUES (1.7976931348623157E+308), (-1.7976931348623157E+308), (0.0); SELECT positiveModulo(CAST(test_value AS Int32), 5) AS modulo_result FROM boundary_test;
